main_themes: The 'Garden of Eden' Reframe: We are always in the garden, just eating the apple of chaos.
God's 'Historical Gusto': Seeing divine intention in geography and timelines (Fatima/Lisbon).
Redemption of 'Evil' Skills: How Andre's past industry experience was Kingdom training.
The Strength of Weakness: Finding absolute peace during a near-death ocean incident.
emotional_peaks: Augusto describing the moment of total peace while being held under by waves.
The full-circle realization that the family gardener is now an Orthodox Priest.
top_truth_flips: You aren't looking for Heaven; you're refusing to live in the Garden you're already in.
God used the tools of the enemy to train you for His purposes.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You aren't trying to find the Garden of Eden; you're living in it, you just won't stop picking the apple.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Massive paradigm shift for stressed men. It defines peace as a 'current choice' rather than a 'future destination.'
nuggets.proof_quote: I would almost argue that we do have, we are in the Garden of Eden, constantly eating the apple. ... We choose to be stressed, rushed, anxious, tired. That is us eating our apples.
hook_angles: Welcome to the Garden of Eden. Why are you still eating the apple?
Heaven on earth is a choice you're currently refusing.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: Stop running an 'apple-eating factory' and enjoy the Garden.
